title: Cozy Broad Beans Tandoor
description: A herbal and chewy keto-friendly Tunisian dish featuring broad beans prepared in a tandoor oven for a cozy meal.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 375°F (190°C). If using a tandoor, heat it up according to the manufacturer's instructions.
In a bowl, mix soaked and drained broad beans with herbs. Add butter and olive oil if preferred.

If using a tandoor, place the mixture on a sheet of parchment paper and fold it over the beans for easy removal. Place in preheated oven or tandoor and cook until tender but not mushy, about 20-30 minutes.
Alternatively, you can use your regular oven: Spread bean mixture evenly on a baking tray lined with parchment paper. Bake at 400°F (205°C) for 15-25 minutes or until beans are cooked and tender.
